name: pharos-crosschain-indexer
description: Cross-chain data query skill for the Pharos AI Agent economy. 14 multi-chain read operations across 112 chains (110 EVM + Solana + Near). Extends pharos-skill-engine.
author: antidumpalways

triggers: what do I own on every chain

capabilities.name: Multi-Chain Balance
capabilities.description: Query native token balance across all configured chains

capabilities.name: Cross-Chain Tx Lookup
capabilities.description: Auto-detect which chain a transaction hash belongs to

capabilities.name: Portfolio Overview
capabilities.description: All native + ERC-20 token balances across all chains

capabilities.name: Address Label
capabilities.description: Lookup address label/identity via PharosScan + Etherscan

capabilities.name: Contract Verification
capabilities.description: Check if contract source is verified on any explorer

capabilities.name: RPC Health Check
capabilities.description: Ping every configured chain RPC and report LIVE/DOWN + block height

capabilities.name: Gas Price Comparison
capabilities.description: Compare current gas price (gwei) across all chains

capabilities.name: Top Chains by Token
capabilities.description: Rank chains by an address's balance of a given token (e.g. USDC)

capabilities.name: Portfolio Suggestions
capabilities.description: Analyze balances + gas and suggest bridge / deploy / pay actions

capabilities.name: Export Portfolio
capabilities.description: Export full portfolio to CSV or HTML report

capabilities.name: Balance Snapshot & Diff
capabilities.description: Save a balance snapshot and compare later to show per-chain deltas

capabilities.name: History Tracking
capabilities.description: Record balance snapshots over time and show trends

capabilities.name: Balance Alert
capabilities.description: Monitor an address and alert on balance changes in real time

capabilities.name: Multi-Address Portfolio
capabilities.description: Aggregate portfolio across multiple addresses in one view
